task.goal: find exploitable vulnerabilities in this Android app: exported components, intent handling, WebView, provider leaks, pendingintent

knowledge: Android App Vulnerability Hunting. Attack-surface priority: exported components, intent filters/deep links, AIDL, dynamic receivers, WebView bridges, PendingIntent, providers. Exhaust ALL attack-surface paths before concluding.
prompt.instructions: Collect attack surface first, decompose into bounded intents, then trace each verified entrypoint to its sink. Exhaust all paths before concluding.

knowledge: Probe-first: the target is an Android APK. Use shell tools to unzip/decompile and inspect it. Cite concrete evidence in every fact.
Evidence gate: accept only if reachable, controllable, deeply traced, and impactful.

prompt.instructions: Review the graph each step. Hint when coverage is incomplete, paths are unexplored, or the planner is missing attack-surface directions.
